description: Single source of truth for deciding which .md files in agency-agents-zh count as selectable roles. Consumed by scripts/setup.js (builds roles-index.json + role count) and agents/harness-selector.md (selection). This is the ONLY place the exclusion logic should live — do not re-hardcode it in scripts or agent prompts.
matching: Case-insensitive against the file basename (without directory). A file is a role IFF it matches include_glob AND its basename contains none of exclude_name_keywords AND its basename starts with none of exclude_name_prefixes.
